name: gmny
description: GMNY — USDC-powered U.S. to Nigeria cross-border payments

scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @gmny/shared && npm run build -w @gmny/auth && npm run build -w @gmny/blockchain && npm run db:generate && npm run build -w @gmny/database
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w @gmny/api && npm run build -w @gmny/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @gmny/auth && npm run test -w @gmny/blockchain && npm run test -w @gmny/api
